title: Flush Statement
description:
Writes a file's buffer into the specified file.

Flush cannot be used if the file was opened with ROpen.
see_also:
Close

Flush Example

Integer fileNum, i

		fileNum = FreeFile

		UOpen "Test.dat" as #fileNum

		For i=1 To 100

		  Print #fileNum, i

		Next i

Flush #fileNum

		Close #fileNum
examples:
Integer fileNum, i
		fileNum = FreeFile
		UOpen "Test.dat" as #fileNum
		For i=1 To 100
		  Print #fileNum, i
		Next i

			Flush #fileNum
		Close #fileNum
